zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault於1145年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特時，她的父親Raoul de Châtellerault36歲，母親Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau30歲。她和Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1187年享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault于1145年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特时，她的父亲Raoul de Châtellerault36岁，母亲Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau30岁。她和Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1187年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Faye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Fay   3 or a habitational name from (La) Faye, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare   Faille   1 and   Lafaye  .
West African (mainly Senegal): from the name of the Faye clan of the Serer people, of unexplained etymology. This surname is also found among the Lebou people. Compare   Fye   3 and   Paye   5.

variants.name: Faille
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Agathe, Andre.
Altered form of French   Faye  . Compare   Fayette   1 and   Foy   5.
French: metonymic occupational name for a torchbearer, from Old French faille ‘torch’ (from Late Latin facilla).

variants.name: Fay
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, John Patrick, Donovan, Fergus, Kieran, Liam, Nuala.
English: nickname for a person believed to have supernatural qualities, from Middle English, Old French faie ‘fairy, witch’ (from Late Latin fata ‘fate, destiny’).
English: nickname for a trustworthy person, from Middle English, Old French fei ‘loyalty, trust’.

nameMeanings.name: Grecia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault was born in 1145, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Raoul de Châtellerault, was 36 and her mother, Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau, was 30. She had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay. She died in 1187, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault est née en 1145, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Raoul de Châtellerault, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay. Elle est décédée en 1187, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault 1145 in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul de Châtellerault 36 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau 30. Sie hatte mit Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1187 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault è nata il nel 1145 nel Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Raoul de Châtellerault, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay. Morì nel 1187, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtelleraultが1145年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで生まれた時，父Raoul de Châtelleraultは36歳，母Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreauは30歳であった。彼女はLord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslayとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1187年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault(이)가 1145년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul de Châtellerault(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1187년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault nasceu em 1145, em Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Raoul de Châtellerault, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay. Ela faleceu em 1187, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault родилась в 1145 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul de Châtellerault было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay. Она умерла в 1187 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault nació en 1145, en Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Raoul de Châtellerault, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Faye-la-Vineuse et de Montsoreau, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay. Murió en 1187, a la edad de 42 años.
